paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% change from the prior close and a -36.32% change over a 20-session window. The price is as of July 17, 2026. There has been 1 new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes a headline from simplywall.st regarding the resignation of director designee Miles Everson due to governance concerns and a $375M convertibles deal. The news item was published on July 17, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings.
